description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the tomsontom/oracle-java8-mvn:latest Docker image and defines two stages: test and build, with MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables as shown. In the test stage add a testMDroidPlus job that runs the command `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test`. In the build stage add a BuildMDroidPlus job that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS -Dmaven.test.skip=true package` and publishes any JAR files matching target/*.jar as artifacts. No services, caches, or conditional rules are required.
